title: Malty American Pie Recipe
description: A sweet and comforting dessert, perfect for any occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour and pie spice.
Add in malted sugar and cardamom, stir until combined.
Add in cold butter and use a pastry blender to work into the dry ingredients.
Roll out dough on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Transfer dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim edges to fit.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and heavy cream.
Pour egg mixture into the pie crust and smooth the top.
Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Allow pie to cool on a wire rack for at least 30 minutes before serving.
